pages.text: It is almost time for the big concert at school. All the children are having fun practising. But not Mihlali …

blocks.text: It is almost time for the big concert at school. All the children are having fun practising. But not Mihlali …

pages.text: “I’ll help you practise at home.” She is worried she will forget her dance steps.

blocks.text: “I’ll help you practise at home.”
She is worried she will forget her dance steps.

pages.text: “I wish this concert would never happen!”

blocks.text: “I wish this concert would never happen!”

pages.text: Not a chance! The day of the concert is getting closer…

blocks.text: Not a chance! The day of the concert is getting closer…

pages.text: GRANNY FROM “Granny has sent you a gift.”

blocks.text: GRANNY FROM
“Granny has sent you a gift.”

pages.text: GRANNY FROM Mihlali is too worried about the concert to open gifts.

blocks.text: GRANNY FROM
Mihlali is too worried about the concert to open gifts.

pages.text: Perhaps she should take a look inside. What great dancing shoes from Granny!

blocks.text: Perhaps she should take a look inside.
What great dancing shoes from Granny!

pages.text: Granny was the best dancer ever.

blocks.text: Granny was the best dancer ever.

pages.text: And at home! Mihlali practises and practises at school… And she dances in her dreams.

blocks.text: And at home!
Mihlali practises and practises at school…
And she dances in her dreams.

pages.text: Mihlali must rest. The big concert is tomorrow.

blocks.text: Mihlali must rest.
The big concert is tomorrow.

pages.text: It’s concert day. Mihlali does her dance just right. What great fun! And surprise! Granny has even come to watch Mihlali dance.

blocks.text: It’s concert day. Mihlali does her dance just right. What great fun!
And surprise! Granny has even come to watch Mihlali dance.

pages.text: “I danced just like you, Granny.” “You were amazing! You are the best dancer I’ve ever seen.”

blocks.text: “I danced just like you, Granny.”
“You were amazing! You are the best dancer I’ve ever seen.”
